name: Modern 2025
description: Aquebogue, New York, close to where I grew up, home to the Modern Snack Bar since 1950. I shot its iconic mid-century sign standing in the middle of Main Road, dressed in black—possibly not the best attire given the speeding October traffic.
additionalInfoDescription1: This image is printed on ChromaLuxe gloss white aluminum. Fabrication and shipping takes 10-14 days. Shipping is included.

name: Merry 2011
description: I have no idea why this happened -  a solo chimney, house long gone, still decorated for the holidays, on the road up to Yosemite National Park in December.
additionalInfoDescription1: This image is printed on ChromaLuxe gloss white aluminum. Fabrication and shipping takes 10-14 days. Shipping is included.

name: Birches 2015
description: Snowshoeing in the foothills outside Santa Fe, New Mexico, on a windy, cold winter day. I didn’t have the right coat, but I had my camera. Office visitors have often asked for a copy as a screensaver.
additionalInfoDescription1: This image is printed on ChromaLuxe gloss white aluminum. Fabrication and shipping takes 10-14 days. Shipping is included.

name: Sequim 2022 Magnet
description: In August 2022, we spent several days staying in Sequim, Washington on the Olympic Peninsula while visiting Olympic National Park. Sequim is one of the sunniest spots on the Pacific Northwest - outside the “rain shadow” of the mountains and known for it’s lavender fields and ocean views. This station sits just east of downtown. And since my father worked for Texaco for almost twenty years, it was an obvious subject.
additionalInfoDescription1: Here's an easy way to get started with the Cascadia Oceanic collection - a magnetic (literal) image perfect for decorating your refrigerator or other metal objects in your home

name: Lake 2022
description: Lake Twentytwo in ’22, actually—on the northern shoulder of Mount Pilchuck in the Cascade Range. Still plenty of snowpack on the way up to the outflow. The brilliant contrast of the clouds reminds me of the booming snowmelt and icefalls, cracking and echoing from the cliff face.
additionalInfoDescription1: This image is printed on ChromaLuxe gloss white aluminum. Fabrication and shipping takes 10-14 days. Shipping is included.

name: Taos 2023
description: Taos Pueblo—a UNESCO World Heritage Site and a U.S. National Landmark—was built between 1000–1450 AD. Although 160 people still live in the complex, it was a surprisingly long wait to find a moment without tourists in Orlando Magic jerseys wandering into the shot.
additionalInfoDescription1: This image is printed on ChromaLuxe gloss white aluminum. Fabrication and shipping takes 10-14 days. Shipping is included.

name: Pike 2025
description: Leaving an art walk in the Belltown neighborhood of Seattle, I was struck by the momentary emptiness of Pike Place, angular neon jutting in different lines and angles.
additionalInfoDescription1: This image is printed on ChromaLuxe gloss white aluminum. Fabrication and shipping takes 10-14 days. Shipping is included.

name: Woodhenge 2025
description: I’ve taken a few pictures along Chuckanut Drive overlooking Samish Bay and the San Juan Islands. This improvised trilithon, built by an unknown visitor in August, framed the idea of Chuckanut—the trees, the rock face, the Salish Sea.
additionalInfoDescription1: This image is printed on ChromaLuxe gloss white aluminum. Fabrication and shipping takes 10-14 days. Shipping is included.

name: Scholastic 2009
description: Tallgrass Prairie National Preserve, northeast of Wichita, Kansas, is the largest remaining stand of what the great prairies of the Midwest were before farms, cities, and towns. The Lower Fox Creek School opened in 1884, closed in 1930, and—restored—was added to the National Register of Historic Places in 1974.
additionalInfoDescription1: This image is printed on ChromaLuxe gloss white aluminum. Fabrication and shipping takes 10-14 days. Shipping is included.

name: Stark 2023
description: An editing “accident” while proofing Alone 2023—the same original image—led me to appreciate the great tonal contrasts of this abandoned house in Clyde, Washington.
additionalInfoDescription1: This image is printed on ChromaLuxe gloss white aluminum. Fabrication and shipping takes 10-14 days. Shipping is included.

name: Wreck 2025
description:
Shot on an extremely dark late October morning near the mouth of the Samish River, near Edison, Washington, I was drawn to the long-abandoned wreck of a wooden boat, its owners and journeys lost to time.

 

This image is printed on ChromaLuxe gloss white aluminum. Fabrication and shipping takes 10-14 days. Shipping is included.
additionalInfoDescription1: This image is printed on ChromaLuxe gloss white aluminum. Fabrication and shipping takes 10-14 days. Shipping is included.

name: Town Beach 1986
description: The largest beach on Long Island Sound in Southold, New York on the North Fork. I lifeguarded at many beaches, including this one, when I was growing up.
additionalInfoDescription1: This image is printed on ChromaLuxe gloss white aluminum. Fabrication and shipping takes 10-14 days. Shipping is included.

name: Coupeville 2023
description: We have a family tradtion to stay for a long weekend in Coupeville, Washington on Penn Cove each October. Coupeville Wharf is an icon, and the sky was especially moody on this blustery early morning.
additionalInfoDescription1: This image is printed on ChromaLuxe gloss white aluminum. Fabrication and shipping takes 10-14 days. Shipping is included.

name: Labor Day 2002
description: Summers end. This was shot through my windshield during a fierce Atlantic downpour on the ferry dock at Orient Point, NY, heading back to Massachusetts on Labor Day.
additionalInfoDescription1: This image is printed on ChromaLuxe gloss white aluminum. Fabrication and shipping takes 10-14 days. Shipping is included.

name: Reading 2024
description: We spent a day touring the south coast of Iceland. Vik is famous for its church, its black sand beaches and its puffins. But this woman reading alone on the basalt columns at the beach was a striking contrast that needed no color adjustments at all.
additionalInfoDescription1: This image is printed on ChromaLuxe gloss white aluminum. Fabrication and shipping takes 10-14 days. Shipping is included.

name: Palm Springs 2022
description: During an architecture tour of desert homes in the Twin Palms neighborhood of Palm Springs, one retro Atomic Age home had a fantastic collection of midcentury cars, including this 1958 Oldsmobile Super 88 in “Turquoise Mist”.
additionalInfoDescription1: This image is printed on ChromaLuxe gloss white aluminum. Fabrication and shipping takes 10-14 days. Shipping is included.

name: Trulock's 2020
description: In August 2020, I was driving cross country solo. Midafternoon, I pulled off to find gas - and found this station instead. It reminded me of Edward Hopper’s famous “Gas” at the Museum of Modern Art in New York. Also, my father worked for Texaco for almost twenty years.
additionalInfoDescription1: This image is printed on ChromaLuxe gloss white aluminum. Fabrication and shipping takes 10-14 days. Shipping is included.

name: Ebey 2024
description: I was fortunate to discover Ebey’s Landing on Whidbey Island on my first trip there, and it remains a beautiful place to observe the Salish Sea, from the beach or the bluffs. This was a magnificent autumn day – windy and warmer than it looks.
additionalInfoDescription1: This image is printed on ChromaLuxe gloss white aluminum. Fabrication and shipping takes 10-14 days. Shipping is included.
